text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi and the other media outlets
have announced a new tournament known as the
Twinkle Star Climax!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to Director Akikawa, only those who
achieve great results in the Twinkle Series may
enter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A major competition for the honor of being
named the greatest... It sounds like a challenge
worth taking on!
